Workshops from Previous Year 2025-2026
docs.text:
Spring 2026

  • Shell Workshop: Learn about the Shell and how to use it
  • Reporducible Research Workshop: Learn how to construct a reproducible research study
  • Git Workshop: Learn how to use git to host and manage version control with code
